summary: Passionate Full Stack Developer with strong problem - solving skills and hands - on experience in designing scalable web applications using the MERN stack. Skilled in JavaScript, React, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, and SQL. Enthusiastic about building clean backend architectures and continuously improving software quality.

projects.title: AI Interview Coach
projects.description: Developed a MERN - based AI Interview Coach that records interview sessions, analyzes candidate responses, generates transcripts, evaluates communication skills, and provides AI - powered feedback with confidence analysis.

projects.title: Canonical Candidate Profile Engine
projects.description: Designed a data transformation engine capable of parsing recruiter CSV files and resume PDFs, normalizing candidate information, merging duplicate profiles, tracking provenance, calculating confidence scores, and generating configurable output schemas.
